channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Paul McCartney Facetiming Ringo Starr During Beatles’ Magical Mystery Tour Is the Cameo of the Year
item.description: 🚀🎸 When legends collide! Paul McCartney surprises Ringo Starr on FaceTime during Beatles' Magical Mystery Tour 🎶✨ #IconsReunite #MusicMagic

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo: Abortion Bans Are “Pro-Control, Not Pro-Life”
item.description: Olivia Rodrigo speaks out 🎤💥 Let's amplify voices fighting for choice! 🙌 #ProChoice #OliviaRodrigo

item.title: Charli XCX Keeps the ‘Camera’ Rolling on Vincent Cassel in New Video
item.description: 🎥 Charli XCX brings the star power in latest music video with Vincent Cassel! ✨ Can you handle all this glam? 💃 #CharliXCX #NewMusicVideo

item.title: Charli XCX – “Camera”
item.description: 📸 Dive into the vibrant world of Charli XCX with her latest track “Camera” 🎶 Ready to hit the replay button! #CharliXCX #NewMusic

item.title: Rainbow Kitten Surprise Join Rolling Stone Rock Tour
item.description: 🌈🐱🎸 Surprising news alert! Rainbow Kitten Surprise is hitting the road with Rolling Stone Rock Tour! Let's rock out together! 🎶 #MusicNews #RainbowKittenSurprise
